heading: Interim authority to regulate gaming
label: 2709 Interim authority to regulate gaming
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the Secretary shall continue to exercise those authorities vested in the Secretary on the day before , relating to supervision of Indian gaming until such time as the Commission is organized and prescribes regulations. The Secretary shall provide staff and support assistance to facilitate an orderly transition to regulation of Indian gaming by the Commission.October 17, 1988
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Indian Gaming Regulatory Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 100–497102 Stat. 2467section 2701 of this titleOct. 17, 1988
